{"code":";; Get all open pull requests across all repositories
(def all-open-prs (github__list_pull_requests {:state "open"}))

;; (a) Count total open pull requests
(def total-open-count (count all-open-prs))

;; (b) Group by repository and find which has the most
(def repo-groups (group-by :repo all-open-prs))
